info.title: Sannr.Cli
info.description: CLI migration tools for Sannr validation framework. Supports automatic migration from DataAnnotations and FluentValidation with both attribute-based and fluent-style output options.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Sannr Migration Tools - Migrate from other validation libraries to Sannr

commands.name: analyze
commands.description: Analyze validation code to understand migration complexity
